data.title: 1-800-Flowers.com taps Home Depot veteran as new CEO
data.description: Adolfo Villagomez, who previously worked as The Home Depot's chief marketing officer, replaces 1-800-Flowers.com founder Jim McCann as its new CEO.

data.title: HealthWarehouse.com Q1 sales triple on strong B2B growth
data.description: Prescription sales reached $14.4 million, up 226% year over year. Most of that growth came from B2B partners.

data.title: ACV Auctions delivers Q1 revenue gain of 25%
data.description: In Q1 2025, ACV Auctions achieved revenue of $182.7 million, marking a 25.4% increase compared to the same period in 2024. This growth surpassed consensus estimates by $599,000.

data.title: GigaCloud grows Q1 marketplace GMV 56%
data.description: “Our platform is built to scale,” says CEO Larry Wu. “The long-term fundamentals of cross-border B2B ecommerce remain intact."

data.title: Beyond reaches $5.2 million deal to acquire Kirkland's intellectual property
data.description: Though the agreement, Beyond will expand an existing credit arrangement while acquiring Kirkland's IP outright.
